articles.title: Duran hits 3-run homer, Tolle pitches 7 innings as Red Sox rally past Tigers 5-4
articles.description:
Duran went 3 for 5 and drove in three runs, and Wilyer Abreu and Marcelo Mayer both finished with RBIs in a 12-hit night for Boston.

articles.description:

articles.title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony leaves game in 2nd inning due to right wrist discomfort
articles.description:

articles.title: Assault trial of former Patriots receiver Stefon Diggs begins with contrasting accounts
